case_title: PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS VS LEON, AMBROCIO et al

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEON, AMBROCIO TORREZ, MARIA LUCIA MENDEZ MENDEZ, MARIA DE LOS ANGELES $1,529.26 PRINCIPAL, $103.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,632.26, DEFENDNTS FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ORDER TO LIFT STAY ON THE WRIT ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SIGNED. ORDER SENT TO THE SHERIFF'S DEPT.
WRIT RETURNED(S.F), PAID TO CREDITOR $835.98,BUT SYSTEM WON'T ACCEPT RETURNED WRIT,RE:"STAY OF EX ECUTION ON FILE FOR WRIT".
